case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. UNIVERSAL LEGAL SUPPORT DBA:EXPRESS NETWORK,INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL LEGAL SUPPORT DBA:EXPRESS NETWORK,INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
